trigger_condition.note: Active allocation % = investor's maximum acceptable drawdown tolerance

sizing_rule.note: Static fractional f with active/inactive split. Active portion sized to match maximum acceptable drawdown tolerance (e.g., 50% drawdown tolerance = 50% active allocation, 50% inactive). Rebalance when equity deviates from target split. Example: optimal_f=0.2 with geometric mean 1.01933.

source_rule_text: Use static fractional f trading with an active/inactive percentage split, adjusting allocation based on investor utility and acceptable drawdown tolerance.
